sources.dataset: Populus synth-pop DB, US_2025.v0 (box, via Tailscale)
sources.note: PPS sample of 39 member tracts; 174,329 residents pooled.
Defines tract sampling probabilities (∝ modeled members).

method: Pulled age/sex for synthetic residents of a member-weighted tract sample; pooled to a member-representative distribution (the spine). Demo census = spine sampled with seeded lognormal perturbation (spec §6.2). Reconciliation overlap computed per attribute.
integrity: Demo census perturbed from real distribution — a fair test, not rigged.
Structural attributes reconcile strongly because synthpop is census-grounded.
Bounded PPS sample; scale to full member tracts on the box (door open).
